title: Show HN: Bento - An entire PowerPoint in one HTML file (edit+view+data+collab)
summary: Bento 是一个开源项目，允许用户将整个 PowerPoint 演示文稿嵌入到一个 HTML 文件中，支持编辑、查看、数据管理和协作功能。它通过将幻灯片内容、样式和交互逻辑整合到一个文件中，简化了演示文稿的创建和分享流程，特别适合需要快速部署和离线使用的场景。
summary_en: Bento is an open-source project that enables embedding an entire PowerPoint presentation into a single HTML file, supporting editing, viewing, data management, and collaboration. By consolidating slide content, styles, and interaction logic into one file, it simplifies the creation and sharing of presentations, especially suitable for quick deployment and offline use.
